channel.title: I do not see the acf in the api in wordpress
channel.description: Hello friends, my name is Santiago. I've recently started working on frontity and I'm getting familiar with custom fields. Well the point that creates a group of personzalized fields and configures from my wordpress so that it will be shown only on a page that I have created that I call "start" and with that (from what I understand) I would already have access to the acf that are on the page are shown in the api so I can come and consume that data in frontity, but they don't appear to me. I need help, I'm very new to this.

item.title: I do not see the acf in the api in wordpress
item.dc:creator: santiagobinario
item.description:
Hello friends, my name is Santiago. I’ve recently started working on frontity and I’m getting familiar with custom fields. Well the point that creates a group of personzalized fields and configures from my wordpress so that it will be shown only on a page that I have created that I call “start” and with that (from what I understand) I would already have access to the acf that are on the page are shown in the api so I can come and consume that data in frontity, but they don’t appear to me. I need help, I’m very new to this.

Read full topic
item.source: I do not see the acf in the api in wordpress
